context:
Current State:
Current State:
- Partner availability: Partner can sometimes handle the morning routine; not guaranteed every day. Generally partner gets home by about six in the evening and helps when they're around; there are occasional travel weeks when they're absent.
- Morning routine design: Create a reliable solo flow for mornings; include a few optional shortcuts the partner can cover on the days they’re available (e.g., breakfast/packing).
- Sleep schedule planning: Target bedtime ~11:00 PM; wake time and total hours unspecified.
- Afternoon/evening constraint: The kid needs to be picked up from aftercare most days around 5:30 PM; evenings have a firm window.
- Evening commitments: Two non-missable weekly commitments on different weeknights.
- Work arrangement: Hybrid; two days per week work-from-home; WFH days not yet selected
- Workout plan: Three weekly workouts; types/durations as specified: brief 20–30 min bodyweight/cardio; longer 45–60 min gym sessions; walks, etc.
- Medication schedule: Taken twice daily, spaced roughly half a day apart; exact moments are somewhat flexible.
